description: Joined a startup focused on advanced shape-memory alloy applications in high-stakes technical environments.
Built pricing and breakeven models for an $800,000 Department of Defense proposal, including direct and indirect cost analysis.

Strengthened startup execution skills by simplifying complex technical-business problems into actionable operating decisions.
Led chapter operations, reporting compliance, and process improvements aligned with the Chapter Management Program.

Built an automated Excel and VBA audit workflow with real-time point visibility for members.
Developed a React Native app with TypeScript and Expo to centralize events, attendance, analytics, and chapter resources.
Executed game-day promotions and sponsor activations to support fan engagement for large live audiences.
Delivered consistent in-game execution and participant management with high operational accuracy.

description: Founded and scaled a university roller hockey club with a 30-plus member roster and flexible participation structure.
Managed sponsorships, budgeting, recruiting, travel logistics, and visibility campaigns to grow competitive presence.
